title: Bouken Yuuki Pluster World
titleNative: 冒険遊記プラスターワールド
synopsis: According to the legend, the once peaceful "Pluster World" plunged into chaos and darkness due to the manifestation of the evil MINASUTA. At that time, selected Plusters were combined with humans, and successfully sealed away the evil MINASUTA. It was then believed that the peace which had returned would continue forever. Greenery and trees filled the land, flowers bloomed everywhere, living creatures soar in the blue sky, run on the land, and swim in the seas. However, this peacefulness was once again lost due to reappearance of the MINASUTA... Now, the fusion of Plusters and Humans once again opens the door for a hot adventure! (Source: AniDB)

tags.name: Proxy Battle
tags.description: A proxy battle is a battle where humans use creatures/robots to do the fighting for them, either by commanding those creatures/robots or by simply evolving them/changing them into battle mode.

tags.name: Isekai
tags.description: Features a character from a modern-day setting being transported into an alternate world and has to adapt to their new surroundings.

title: Ookami Shounen Ken
titleNative: 狼少年ケン
synopsis: Ken The Wolf Boy is about the adventures of Ken, who was brought up by wolves in the jungle and can be compared to Jungle Book. His main companions were two young wolves named Chi Chi and Po Po. (Source: AniDB)

synopsis: This animated story features Manxmouse, the mouse that looks like a rabbit, and all because of his ears. Join in the adventures in this delightful story. (Source: MSN Movies)

titleNative: 緊急発進セイバーキッズ
synopsis: An adventure anime series by Tokyo Movie Shinsha, originally created by mangaka Monkey Punch.

title: Tottoko Hamtarou: Hamu Hamu Paradichu!
titleNative: とっとこハム太郎 はむはむぱらだいちゅ!
synopsis: A direct continuation of the Tottoko Hamtarou series, introducing new characters.

title: Riri to Kaeru to (Otouto)
titleNative: リリとカエルと(弟)
synopsis: Riri went to an amusement park using the frog as its symbol character with her parents. At the Frog Castle of the park, she happened to draw a sword. It was said that the Frog King would grant any wish if one beat the big snake with the sword. When Riri beat the snake, she went to the Frog Land and met the Frog King. The king said she would become a frog if she couldn't open the Gate of Hope until a child would hatch from the roe in front of her. Suddenly, a man in suits appeared. His name was Knodo, and he was supposed to become her little brother. Riri thought it strange, and she ran away from him. He chased her. Then, they fell over into the water head over heels. (Source: AnimeNfo)

title: Noozles
titleNative: ふしぎなコアラ ブリンキー
synopsis: One day, Sandy's father, Prof. Brown, sends her a stuffed koala doll from one of his trips. Sandy discovers that, after rubbing the koala's nose, he comes alive. His name is Blinky and he is from the magical "down under" Koalawalla Land. They are soon joined by his little sister, Pinky. Adventures ensue in both Sandy's world and Koalawalla land. Among the characters met are 2 men after the "magical talking bear", a lizard that bounces back and forth from the magical realm and the real realm, and kangaroo police officers. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Don Quixote in the Tales of La Mancha
titleRomaji: Zukkoke Knight: Don De La Mancha
titleEnglish: Don Quixote in the Tales of La Mancha
titleNative: ずっこけナイト　ドンデラマンチャ
synonyms: Don Quijote y los Cuentos De La Mancha
synopsis: Don Quixote, that infinitely popular character, travels the countryside battling windmills and attempting to win the love of his Dulcinea.

tags.name: Historical
tags.description: Partly or completely set during a real period of world history.

title: Pucca 3
titleNative: 뿌까 3
synopsis: In the third season of Pucca Goh-Rong faces a new rivalry with new local restaurant titled Dong King Restaurant. Ring Ring, a local 12-year-old fashion star, who appeared in previous seasons grows a love interest to Garu, while also being revealed to be the daughter of Dong King and works alongside him and his servants against Pucca and Dong King.

title: Akuma Tou no Prince: Mitsume ga Tooru
titleRomaji: Akuma Tou no Prince: Mitsume ga Tooru
titleNative: 悪魔島のプリンス 三つ目がとおる
synopsis: The popular Manga "The Three-Eyed Boy Comes Here" was produced as the eighth in an animated series for a special 24-hour broadcast. This time, the movie was produced by Toei Animation Co., Ltd. instead of by Tezuka Productions Co., Ltd. Here, Tezuka Osamu was in charge of only the original story and a synopsis for animation. Based on the original Manga, "Easter Island: Sea voyage," Sharaku and Wato investigate a mysterious old ship, only to find themselves getting involved in a sea voyage around strange islands. More emphasis was placed on entertainment factors than on theme, and this change in the concept line resulted in the withdrawal of Tezuka Productions Co., Ltd. from this series. (Source: tezukaosamu.net)

tags.name: Lost Civilization

title: Marine Boy
titleNative: 海底少年マリン
synopsis: Yet another expansion of the Marine Boy series. This time 65 episodes were added to the 1966 series and all 78 episodes were sold to the US. The broadcast history of the show in Japan was slightly more complicated, with only the first 36 episodes of the 78 shown at first but later on all 78 were shown, out of which 65 are contained in this entry and 13 in the Ganbare! Marine Kid series.

title: The Many Dream Journeys of Meme
titleRomaji: Miimu Iro Iro Yume no Tabi
titleEnglish: The Many Dream Journeys of Meme
titleNative: ミームいろいろ夢の旅
synopsis: Meme, a very cute and strange creature, is this leading character of this series. One day Meme comes out of a computer and meets Daisuke and Sayaka. Meme guides the kids throughout his world, where they meet world-famous scientists, inventors and scholars such as Galileo, Pasteur, Kepler, and many more. This series is not only highly entertaining for children and the entire family but is also very interesting and educational. [from AnimeNfo.com]

synopsis: The "hyper casual fantasy" is set in Snack World, a seemingly traditional fantasy world — except it has convenience stores, smartphones, and other elements of the modern world. A new CG cross-media project by Level-5. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Super Doll★Licca-chan: Licca-chan Zettai Zetsumei! Doll Knights no Kiseki
titleRomaji: Super Doll★Licca-chan: Licca-chan Zettai Zetsumei! Doll Knights no Kiseki
titleNative: スーパードール★リカちゃん リカちゃん絶体絶命! ドールナイツの奇跡
synonyms: Super Doll Liccachan: Rika-chan's Desperate Situation! The Doll Knights' Miracle
synopsis: A fun day at the amusement park is interrupted when the evil witch Dana is reawakened. Queen Yae has sent her after Rika and only the Doll Knights can stop this threat. Meanwhile, Dai and the others must deal with other dangers. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Eclipse of Illusion
titleNative: 云深不知梦
synonyms: คราสมายา หวนสู่สังหาร
synopsis: Yun Wangshu's wedding was meant to be the happiest day of her life, but a brutal conspiracy turned it into a nightmare, slaughtering her entire clan. After a narrow escape, she made a desperate deal with the Silent Court. Now, sixty years later, reborn as the merciless Xihe, she's ready to make her enemies bleed for everything they took from her. (Source: Youku International Website)

tags.name: Conspiracy

tags.description: Prominently features a character who aims to exact punishment in a resentful or vindictive manner.

tags.name: Anti-Hero
tags.description: Features a protagonist who lacks conventional heroic attributes and may be considered a borderline villain.

tags.name: Cultivation
tags.description: Features characters using training, often martial arts-related, and other special methods to cultivate qi (a component of traditional Chinese philosophy, described as "life force") and gain strength or immortality.

tags.name: Reincarnation
tags.description: Features a character being born again after death, typically as another person or in another world.

tags.name: Tragedy
tags.description: Centers around tragic events and unhappy endings.

tags.name: Yuri
tags.description: Prominently features romance between two females, not inherently sexual. Also known as Girls' Love.

tags.description: Almost entirely created with computer-generated imagery.

tags.name: Dragons
tags.description: Prominently features mythical reptiles which generally have wings and can breathe fire.

tags.name: Necromancy
tags.description: When the dead are summoned as spirits, skeletons, or the undead, usually for the purpose of gaining information or to be used as a weapon.

title: Ai no Senshi Rainbowman
titleNative: 愛の戦士レインボーマン
synopsis: In the mountains of India, a man named Takeshi Yamato gains the abilities of the legendary Rainbow Warrior, allowing him to transform into Rainbowman. With this power, he has to stop aliens from invading the earth.

title: Yamato Takeru: After War
titleNative: ヤマトタケル ～After War～
synopsis: Three years have passed after the decisive battle at the end of Yamato Takeru and peace has return to the land. Takeru, Oto and their friends return to the village and continue living their days in bliss until one night Shuranoo, piloted by Mikazuchi, marks a return and appears in the village to wreak havoc. Takeru is left without any choice and is forced to reactivate the sealed Susanoo from his slumber. However, this is just the beginning of a new threat, and Takeru has to overcome himself if he wants to rescue Oto from the impending danger. (Source: AniDB)

tags.name: Magic
tags.description: Prominently features magical elements or the use of magic.

tags.name: Super Robot
tags.description: Prominently features large robots often piloted by hot-blooded protagonists.

title: Monkey Magic
titleNative: モンキーマジック
synopsis: From out of the fires of space he was born... Kongo, a monkey made of stone, magically brought to life. Obsessed with a desire to learn and a need to be great, Kongo leaves his "family" on Flower Fruit Mountain in search of ancient knowledge and arcane wisdom. Not content to merely study and learn the mystical arts, Kongo masters the magic Jet Cloud, the first of his great weapons. With the power of the Jet Cloud, Kongo gains mastery of the air and returns to his adopted home just in time. Humans are laying claim to the monkeys` ancestral home. With his Jet Cloud and his newly-learned magical wisdom, Kongo defeats the humans and proclaims himself King of Flower Fruit Mountain. But in the Celestial Heavens, the gods are uneasy. A monkey defeating humans and declaring himself king? That cannot be allowed! They decide the monkeys must be taught a lesson and so they launch an attack on Kongo and all the monkeys of Flower Fruit Mountain. (Source: AniDB)

title: Akadou Suzunosuke
titleNative: 赤胴鈴之助
